name: knowledge-refinery
description: Local, Git-backed cross-project experience and memory refinery

interface.shortDescription: Keep reusable experience in a local Git-backed vault.
interface.longDescription: Knowledge Refinery records integrated development experiences and reusable memory through a local MCP server while keeping product and knowledge Git histories separate.
defaultPrompt: Set up Knowledge Refinery for this repository.
Check whether Knowledge Refinery is enabled here.
Review enabled repositories for reusable memory.
